word: G1745 - ἔνδυσις - éndysis - en'-doo-sis - Putting on

sections.paragraph:
- Original: ἔνδυσις

- Transliteration: Endusis

- Phonetic: en'-doo-sis

- Definition:

1. a putting on

- Origin: from G1746

- TDNT entry: None

- Part(s) of speech: Noun Feminine

- Strong's: From G1746; investment with clothing: - putting on.
